user.title: Peak Power Forecast
user.description: Select a current average demand sensor, which tracks the quarterhourly peak power consumption (preferred). Alternatively, if you do not have this type of sensor, you can select a cumulative energy consumption sensor (Wh or kWh). The integration will then derive the current quarter average demand using fixed wall-clock quarter boundaries.

setup_limits.title: Set forecast limits
setup_limits.description: Choose the warning and critical levels used for status and color output.

error.sensor_not_found: The selected sensor was not found.
error.sensor_not_numeric: The selected sensor does not currently have a numeric state.
error.source_sensor_required: Select a current average demand sensor or choose cumulative fallback mode.
error.cumulative_sensor_required: Select a cumulative energy sensor for fallback mode.
error.cumulative_sensor_not_found: The cumulative energy sensor was not found.
error.cumulative_sensor_not_numeric: The cumulative energy sensor does not currently have a numeric state.
error.cumulative_sensor_unsupported_unit: Unsupported unit. Use a cumulative energy sensor with unit Wh or kWh.
error.cumulative_sensor_wrong_device_class: This sensor should use device class energy.
error.cumulative_sensor_wrong_state_class: This sensor should use state class total or total_increasing.

init.title: Peak Power Forecast options
init.description:
Input settings: choose the mode and input sensor.

Forecast settings below control forecast behavior and alert thresholds.

error.sensor_not_found: The selected sensor was not found.
error.sensor_not_numeric: The selected sensor does not currently have a numeric state.
error.invalid_stale_timeout: Stale timeout must be between 5 and 600 seconds.
error.duplicate_source: Another Peak Power Forecast entry already uses this source sensor.
error.monthly_sensor_not_found: The monthly peak sensor was not found.
error.monthly_sensor_not_numeric: The monthly peak sensor does not currently have a numeric state.
error.invalid_threshold: Warning and critical levels must be positive numbers.
error.warning_not_below_critical: Warning level must be lower than critical level.
error.source_sensor_required: Select a current average demand sensor for direct mode.
error.cumulative_sensor_required: Select an input sensor for fallback mode.
error.cumulative_sensor_not_found: The cumulative energy sensor was not found.
error.cumulative_sensor_not_numeric: The cumulative energy sensor does not currently have a numeric state.
error.cumulative_sensor_unsupported_unit: Unsupported unit. Use Wh or kWh.
error.cumulative_sensor_wrong_device_class: The cumulative sensor should use device class energy.
error.cumulative_sensor_wrong_state_class: The cumulative sensor should use state class total or total_increasing.

peak_power_forecast_projected.name: Peak Power Forecast projected
peak_power_forecast_projected.description: Extrapolated end-of-quarter kW from the current quarter average (capped); the main forecast blends this with the previous quarter over time.
